positive: Symmetrical, highly detailed illustration featuring interconnected celestial elements (phases of the moon, subtle constellations) woven seamlessly with stylized, elegant botanical motifs like ferns and whispering vines. The composition should be centered, radial, and mandala-like, forming a cohesive wearable art design. Use a vintage, Art Nouveau-inspired style with strong, clean silhouettes and extremely high contrast. The color palette must be limited and sophisticated: deep indigo blue, muted gold leaf accents, and creamy ivory. Clean line work, graphic vector illustration quality, suitable for high-quality apparel screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, grainy, text, signature, watermark, low detail, ugly, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, photorealistic, 3d render, graffiti
